ground.schema:
Node properties:
User {betweenness: FLOAT, location: STRING, followers: INTEGER, following: INTEGER, profile_image_url: STRING, screen_name: STRING, name: STRING, url: STRING, statuses: INTEGER}
Me {profile_image_url: STRING, betweenness: FLOAT, following: INTEGER, url: STRING, location: STRING, followers: INTEGER, screen_name: STRING, name: STRING}
Tweet {created_at: DATE_TIME, id: INTEGER, id_str: STRING, text: STRING, favorites: INTEGER, import_method: STRING}
Hashtag {name: STRING}
Link {url: STRING}
Source {name: STRING}
Relationship properties:
SIMILAR_TO {score: FLOAT}
The relationships:
(:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:User)
(:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:Me)
(:User)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)
(:User)-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(:User)
(:User)-[:SIMILAR_TO]->(:User)
(:User)-[:SIMILAR_TO]->(:Me)
(:Me)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)
(:Me)-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:RT_MENTIONS]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:AMPLIFIES]->(:User)
(:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:User)
(:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:Me)
(:Tweet)-[:USING]->(:Source)
(:Tweet)-[:TAGS]->(:Hashtag)
(:Tweet)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Link)
(:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(:Tweet)
(:Tweet)-[:REPLY_TO]->(:Tweet)
ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:User {screen_name: 'TwitterUser123'})-[r1:FOLLOWS]->(b:User),
    p2 = (a)-[r2:POSTS]->(c:Tweet {id: 1001}),
    p3 = (c)-[r3:MENTIONS]->(d:User {screen_name: 'TwitterUser456'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How do the engagement patterns of TwitterUser123’s recent posts compare to the users they directly follow, particularly when those posts explicitly mention TwitterUser456?

cypher:
MATCH (u:User {screen_name: 'TwitterUser123'})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(m:User {screen_name: 'TwitterUser456'})
WHERE EXISTS {   (u)-[:FOLLOWS]->(followed:User)  
WHERE followed IN map(m.screen_name -> followed) }
WITH u, collect(t) AS recent_tweets
UNWIND recent_tweets AS tweet
WITH u, tweet
MATCH (u)-[:FOLLOWS]->(followed:User)
WHERE followed IN map(tweet.text -> followed) 
WITH u, followed, count(tweet) AS tweet_count
RETURN u.screen_name AS user, tweet_count AS tweets_count, followed.screen_name AS followed_user
